2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 59
Date 04 July 2026
Time 18:42
Title Decision - Qualifying SC2 - SC1 Times
Description Decision - Qualifying SC2 - SC1 Times
Enclosed GBR DOC 59 - Qualifying SC2-SC1 Times.pdf
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury

 
 
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 – 05 July 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 59 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  04 July 2026 
 
        Time  18:42 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 car below exceeded the 1:39.0 time limit between the Safety Car lines. 
 
No. Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 6 Isack Hadjar Oracle Red Bull Racing 16:18:10 L7 (Q1) 
 
 
Infringement Alleged Breach of Article B1.8.5 of the FIA F1 Regulations and Article 12.2.1.i of the FIA International 
Sporting Code by failing to comply with the Race Director's Competition Notes (Item 1, Document 5) 
and the Note to Teams (Document 17). 
  
Decision No further action.   
Reasons The Stewards
